rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: High environmental score may reduce operational costs.
Low ESG score may increase capital costs.
suggestedActions: Set improvement targets for each ESG pillar.
Consider carbon offset programs for residual emissions.

description.short: Calculate recycling rate as percentage of waste recovered.
description.long: Calculate recycling rate as percentage of waste recovered.

short_i18n.en: Calculate recycling rate as percentage of waste recovered.
short_i18n.tr: Atık yönetimindeki başarı ve kazanım yüzdesini (geri dönüşüm oranı) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnung der Recyclingquote als Prozentsatz des zurückgewonnenen Abfalls.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le taux de recyclage en pourcentage des déchets récupérés.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la tasa de reciclaje como porcentaje de residuos recuperados.
short_i18n.ar: احسب معدل إعادة التدوير كنسبة مئوية من النفايات المستردة.

long_i18n.fr: Calculer le taux de recyclage en pourcentage des déchets récupérés.
long_i18n.es: Calcular la tasa de reciclaje como porcentaje de residuos recuperados.
